## Describe the bug

A clear, short description of the bug.

## To reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error (or wrong behavior)

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04)
- Node version: (`node -v`)
- Browser: (e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17)
- App: (web / Android build)

## Screenshots or console errors

If applicable, add screenshots or paste console/terminal errors.

## Additional context

Any other details that might help (e.g. .env setup, backend running or not).
